subcodes.first_line: O guest! Bear thou witness within thine own self that verily He is God, alone, with no partner. His are glory and perpetuity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا میهمان ان اشهدی فی ذاتک بانه هو الله وحده لا شریک له له العزه و البقا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
